items.title: Title
items.description: Identify the report as a scoping review.

items.title: Structured summary
items.description: Provide a structured summary that includes (as applicable): background, objectives, eligibility criteria, sources of evidence, charting methods, results, and conclusions that relate to the review questions and objectives.

items.title: Rationale
items.description: Describe the rationale for the review in the context of what is already known; explain why the review questions/objectives lend themselves to a scoping review approach.

items.title: Objectives
items.description: Provide an explicit statement of the questions and objectives being addressed with reference to their key elements (e.g. population, concepts, context) or other relevant key elements used to conceptualise the review questions and/or objectives.

items.title: Protocol and registration
items.description: Indicate whether a review protocol exists; state if and where it can be accessed (e.g. a web address) and registration information including the registration number.

items.title: Eligibility criteria
items.description: Specify characteristics of the sources of evidence used as eligibility criteria (e.g. years considered, language, publication status), and provide a rationale.

items.title: Information sources
items.description: Describe all information sources in the search (e.g. databases with dates of coverage, contact with authors to identify additional sources), as well as the date the most recent search was executed.

items.title: Search
items.description: Present the full electronic search strategy for at least 1 database, including any limits used, such that it could be repeated.

items.title: Selection of sources of evidence
items.description: State the process for selecting sources of evidence (i.e. screening and eligibility) included in the scoping review.

items.title: Data charting process
items.description: Describe the methods of charting data from the included sources of evidence (e.g. calibrated forms or forms that have been tested by the team before their use, and whether data charting was done independently or in duplicate) and any processes for obtaining and confirming data from investigators.

items.title: Data items
items.description: List and define all variables for which data were sought and any assumptions and simplifications made.

items.title: Critical appraisal of individual sources of evidence
items.description: If done, provide a rationale for conducting a critical appraisal of included sources of evidence; describe the methods used and how this information was used in any data synthesis (if appropriate).

items.title: Synthesis of results
items.description: Describe the methods of handling and summarising the data that were charted.

items.title: Selection of sources of evidence
items.description: Give numbers of sources of evidence screened, assessed for eligibility, and included in the review, with reasons for exclusions at each stage, ideally using a flow diagram.

items.title: Characteristics of sources of evidence
items.description: For each source of evidence, present characteristics for which data were charted and provide the citations.

items.title: Critical appraisal within sources of evidence
items.description: If done, present data on critical appraisal of included sources of evidence.

items.title: Results of individual sources of evidence
items.description: For each included source of evidence, present the relevant data that were charted that relate to the review questions and objectives.

items.title: Synthesis of results
items.description: Summarise and/or present the charting results as they relate to the review questions and objectives.

items.title: Summary of evidence
items.description: Summarise the main results (including an overview of concepts, themes, and types of evidence available); link to the review questions and objectives, and consider the relevance to key groups.

items.title: Limitations
items.description: Discuss the limitations of the scoping review process.

items.title: Conclusions
items.description: Provide a general interpretation of the results with respect to the review questions and objectives, as well as potential implications and/or next steps.

items.title: Funding
items.description: Describe sources of funding for the included sources of evidence, as well as sources of funding for the scoping review; describe role of funders.
